phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is open today
phrases.cultural_note: The Institut Lumière is housed in the family villa of the Lumière brothers, pioneers of cinema.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for two tickets to the museum
phrases.text_local: Deux billets pour le musée, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: duh bee-YEH poor luh moo-ZAY, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays original Cinématographe cameras, early film reels, and photographs. The adjacent Villa Lumière (the family home) can also be visited.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether there is a cinema screening original Lumière films
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des projections de films des frères Lumière ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day pro-zhek-SYOHN duh FEELM day frair loo-MYAIR
phrases.cultural_note: The institute operates a cinema that screens early Lumière films alongside classic and contemporary world cinema. L'Arrivée d'un train en gare is always a crowd favourite.

responses.english: Yes, in the room at the back.
responses.phonetic: wee, dahn lah SAL oh FOHN
responses.french: Oui, dans la salle au fond.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide available
phrases.cultural_note: The Institut Lumière offers audio guides in several languages to accompany the visit.

phrases.intent_en: Buy a souvenir related to the history of cinema
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous des souvenirs liés à l'histoire du cinéma ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY-voo day soov-NEER lyay ah lees-TWAR doo see-nay-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop sells prints, books, posters, and replicas of original equipment. It is an excellent place to find thoughtful gifts related to film history.
